creator: sean@stat.Duke.EDU
text:
It might be nice to have the information available
	on http://people.freebsd.org/~msmith/RAID more widely
	available .. as it is useful for spec'ing out hardware.

Fix: 

I was thinking a link to 

	http://people.freebsd.org/~msmith/RAID/

	from

        http://www.freebsd.org/projects/projects.html#devicedrivers

	might prove useful for folks setting up FreeBSD servers.
How-To-Repeat: 
	It's just not there :)
